ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, UK, AUS, CHN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the region */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Primary language code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the size conversion is applicable */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 5, 5.5, 6) */,
  "inch_value" REAL /* Equivalent measurement in inches */,
  "cm_value" REAL /* Equivalent measurement in centimeters */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the size conversion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses, Outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion history entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the size conversion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the size conversion */,
  "conversion_time" TEXT /* Time of the size conversion */,
  "user_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes provided by the user during the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the product in the region and size */,
  "conversion_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the size conversion was used for the product in the region */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
